text:
(1) Reference for examination and approval when establishing securities companies,
fund management companies and futures companies, and for registration as manag-
er in private equity investment funds; restriction from purchasing listed companies
(2) Strict examination and verification when issuing bonds in the interbank market
(3) Restriction from establishing financial guarantee companies; restriction from act-
ing as CEO, supervisory board member of senior manager in financial guarantee
companies or financial organs
(4) Assistance in due diligence for government procurement programme infor-
mation; restriction from participation in government procurement in activities
(5) Restriction from the establishment of insurance companies, restriction from the
purchase insurance products with a cash value by paying high insurance premiums
(6) Reference for cautious consultation when examining and approving the estab-
lishment of commercial banks or branches, representative offices as well as buying
shares in or purchasing commercial banks
(7) Suspension from share-based incentive plans in domestic State-owned or con-
trolled enterprises, or termination of entitlement as a participant in share-holding
inventive schemes
(8) Cautious reference when checking and managing foreign exchange quota
(9) Acetous reference when awarding credit authorization to financial bodies
(10) Restriction from subsidies and social security payments support
(11) Reference when assessing preferential policies
(12) Strengthening daily supervision, management and inspection
(13) Restriction from acting as statutory representative, CEO or supervisory board
member in State-owned enterprises
(14) Restriction from registry as the statutory representative of an undertaking work
unit
(15) Open publication through the "Credit China" website and the enterprise credit
information publication system
(16) Open publication through major news web sites.
(17) Restriction from recruitment as civil servant or staff in undertaking work units.
(18) Prohibition from recognition as civilized work unit or model of virtue
(19) Restriction from flying on aircraft, soft sleepers on trains and other such con-
sumption acts not necessary for life or work
(20) Restriction from staying in high star-rated hotels and guesthouses; restriction
from consumption in nightclubs and golf courses
(21) Restriction from purchasing immovable property and State-owned property

122 "Guanyu dui shixin bei zhixingren shishi lianhe chengjie de hezuo beiwanglu. [Memorandum of

Understanding on Cooperation concerning Implementing Joint Punishment against Untrustworthy
Persons Subject to Enforcement]." National Development and Reform Commission. 28 January 2016.
Online: http://credit.mot.gov.cn/zhengcefagui/guojia/201607/t20160706_2058154.html
